name: Chip
summary: Compact pill showing a label with an optional icon/avatar and a removal action; use it for tags, filters, and selected tokens — provide `onDelete` to make it dismissible.

props.name: intent
props.description: Semantic color intent mapping to theme tokens.

props.name: color
props.description: Explicit color override (theme token or CSS color).

props.name: labels
props.description:
Instance-level overrides for this component's i18n strings. Wins over the
`ValetLocaleProvider` value, which in turn wins over the built-in English
defaults (A11Y S8 resolution contract; see `src/system/locale.tsx`).

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Use Chip for compact descriptors such as tags, owners, or status pills — they are static text tokens, not buttons.
Never rely on Chip for selection, toggles, or navigation. Pair it with an adjacent Button or Menu action if interaction is required.
Keep labels short; truncate is automatic. Use Tooltip if critical text may be hidden.
Use the built-in variant/size/color props or presets instead of custom inline styles for consistency.

Only expose removal via the dedicated `onDelete` affordance so keyboard and pointer users can target a clear control. The delete button stays visually compact but gets an invisible ≥44px hit-expander on coarse pointers (32px under `compact`), so it's reliably tappable on touch without bloating the chip.
Tie Chip colours to theme tokens so meaning remains clear across light and dark modes.
Internationalize the built-in labels with the `labels` prop (instance-level) or a `ValetLocaleProvider` (app-wide). Resolution is instance `labels` > provider strings > built-in English.

examples.title: Variants & Colors
examples.code:
<Stack direction='row' gap={0.5}>
  <Chip label="Primary" color="primary" />
  <Chip label="Secondary" color="secondary" />
  <Chip label="Tertiary" color="tertiary" />
  <Chip label="Outlined" variant="outlined" />
</Stack>

examples.title: With icon & delete
examples.code:
<Stack direction='row' gap={0.5}>
  <Chip label="Assignee" icon="mdi:account" />
  <Chip label="Filter" icon="mdi:filter-variant" onDelete={() => {}} />
</Stack>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Stack direction='row' gap={0.5}>
  <Chip label="Small" size="sm" />
  <Chip label="Medium" size="md" />
  <Chip label="Large" size="lg" />
</Stack>

examples.title: With legend context
examples.code:
<Stack gap={0.5}>
  <Typography variant="subtitle">Status</Typography>
  <Stack direction='row' gap={0.5}>
    <Chip label="New" color="primary" />
    <Chip label="In review" color="secondary" />
    <Chip label="Blocked" color="error" />
  </Stack>
</Stack>
